heading: Aviation training facilities
label: 8217 Aviation training facilities
text: The President may maintain facilities to provide flight training for 16,000 members of the naval service.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6022.34 U.S.C. 736(2d sentence), .June 15, 1940, ch. 375, § 154 Stat. 400The proviso to the effect that the section does not affect the responsibility of the Secretary of the Navy under is omitted as unnecessary. The words “as may, in his judgment, be necessary” are omitted as surplusage. The words “members of the naval service” are substituted for “naval aviators” to avoid the implication that trainees are naval aviators while undergoing the training. The designation depends on successful completion of flight training.34 U.S.C. 732

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8217, added , , , related to authorized strength of Air Force in reserve commissioned officers in active status, prior to repeal by , , . See .Pub.
